chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1333 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.5135/2022 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 29.11.2023 Mr. Ahmed Mehran Goraya, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Dr. Muhammad Rafique (ADHO on behalf of District Health Officer, Khairpur), Dr. Tahira Kanwal (DDHO- RMNCH) and Mrs. Surriya (Principal CMW School)..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Petitioners are sisters, have filed this petition seeking directions to respondents to admit them in the Community Midwifery Training Course on the ground that they had applied for admission in the year 2022 in that course but were ignored, and less qualified candidates were selected. The comments have been filed by the other side, which show that both the petitioners had failed to qualify for the admission in the said course, and more so, this is a course only for two years, one year has already passed. Learned Counsel for the petitioners submits that all the admissions have been made under political influence, and the result was not announced. However, both the grounds are based on assumptions only as no proof has been filed that any of the candidates was selected for admission under any political influence, and the result of the test has already been filed by the respondents along with the comments. No case on merits, therefore, is made out, and the petition is accordingly dismissed. However, the petitioners may apply next year for admission in the same course and their admission would be considered in accordance with law.

No case on merits, therefore, is made out, and the petition is accordingly dismissed. However, the petitioners may apply next year for admission in the same course and their admission would be considered in accordance with law. The petition is accordingly disposed of along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
